Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a feature PR rather than a bug report, so there is no current-main failure path to reproduce.

target.title: feat: classify plugin SDK impact labels
target.body:
## Summary
- Adds OpenClaw Plugin SDK impact labels and deterministic classification.
- Syncs one `plugin-sdk:*` label from current complete reports, preserving higher maintainer/ClawSweeper labels.
- Emits exact-head/base/path-hash report metadata for the OpenClaw CI gate.

## Linked context
- Companion OpenClaw CI gate: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/91290

## Verification
- `pnpm run check`
- `autoreview --mode local`
- `autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`
target.author: jalehman
